caption: The video depicts a formal meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, held on April 12, 2019, focusing on S.23, a bill to increase the minimum wage. The scene shows a group of individuals seated around a conference table, engaged in discussion. A man with a beard and glasses, wearing a suit and tie, appears to be speaking passionately, gesturing with his hands as he makes his points. To his left, another man is seen with his hand on his head, possibly indicating contemplation or concern. Other committee members, including a woman with blonde hair and a man in a vest, listen attentively. The setting includes various items on the table such as water bottles, a coffee cup, and documents, suggesting a serious and professional atmosphere. The background features a sign that reads "Military Affairs," reinforcing the context of the meeting.
